## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (`composer test` green)
- [ ] `composer stan` (PHPStan level 8) green
- [ ] `composer validate --strict` green
- [ ] No secrets / API keys / PII in code, fixtures, or messages
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (user-visible changes)

> Security fix? Don't open a public PR — see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
